arts.sum: Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappé is back available for the Madrid derby after recovering from a calf injury.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Madrid Derbi against Atletico de Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s crucial Madrid Derbi against Atletico de Madrid. Midfielders: Bellingham, Camavinga, Valverde, Modrić, Tchouameni, Arda Güler, Ceballos.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Atletico Madrid: Kylian Mbappe, Jude Bellingham decisions made as Los Blancos confirm squad for Madrid derby
arts.sum: Real Madrid release their squad list for Saturday's Madrid derby against Atletico Madrid, with decisions being made on Jude Bellingham and Kylian Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Man City include injured Rodri in their Champions League knockout phase squad - but £29.4m signing is snubbed ahead of Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Rodri played his last game for the Citizens back in September 2024, in a 2-2 draw against Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium, but was still called up ahead of his side's clash against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “They say the system favours Real Madrid, but when we want to change it, they reject it”
arts.sum: He was asked about all the controversy about the referees over the week, to which he said: “I wouldn’t like to touch on this subject before such an important match. Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media ahead of the crucial match against Atletico Madrid on Saturday.
